name: SAP Concur
description: Manage Concur expense reports, approvals, attendees, locations, users and travel itineraries from any AI agent. OAuth 2.0 refresh-token flow. Free developer sandbox on developer.concur.com.
instructions:
**Setup**:
1. Sign up on https://developer.concur.com and create a Company Sandbox.
2. Register a new app in the **My Apps** page → request scopes `EXPRPT`, `USER`, `LIST` (and optionally `TRVPRO` for travel).
3. Concur emails you a `Client ID` + `Client Secret`. Generate a `Refresh Token` via the Password Grant — needed once.
4. Decide your region: `us` (https://us.api.concursolutions.com) or `eu` (https://eu.api.concursolutions.com).
5. Set the four env vars below.

**Authentication**: OAuth2 refresh-token grant. The adapter auto-refreshes the access token before expiry.

**Rate limits**: 25 requests/sec per refresh token (defaults). Bulk export endpoints have stricter quotas.

tools.name: concur_list_reports
tools.description: List expense reports for the connected company. Use `user=ALL` (default) for org-wide view or a specific login ID for a single user.

user.description: Login ID of the user to filter, or `ALL` for all users (default)

approvalStatusCode.description: Approval status filter, e.g. A_PEND, A_APPR, A_REJC

tools.name: concur_get_report
tools.description: Get the full detail of one expense report by its ID.

tools.name: concur_list_report_entries
tools.description: List the individual expense entries (line items) inside a given report.

tools.name: concur_submit_report
tools.description: Submit an expense report for approval. The report must be in a non-submitted state.

tools.name: concur_workflow_action
tools.description: Approve, send-back or reject a submitted expense report. Action ∈ Approve, Send Back, Reject.

comment.description: Optional comment shown in the workflow

tools.name: concur_list_attendees
tools.description: List meeting/expense attendees registered in the company directory.

tools.name: concur_list_locations
tools.description: List travel/expense locations (cities, regions) available to your tenant.

tools.name: concur_list_users
tools.description: List user accounts in the connected Concur tenant.

tools.name: concur_get_user
tools.description: Get one user profile by its Concur user ID.

tools.name: concur_list_itineraries
tools.description: List travel itineraries (Concur Travel). Requires TRVPRO scope on the OAuth client.
